reference: I am female, twenty-eight years old. I have lupus nephritis stage four. I am on CellCept three thousand. I took one pill of Imodium a few days ago to stop diarrhea since I was traveling by plane. I was throwing up on the plane. Since then, I have some abdominal swelling and constipation. Could the Imodium have affected my kidneys? What should I do?
text: Francino, twenty-eight years old, I have lived since Friday's date four. I am on cell step three thousand. I took one pill of amodia a few days ago to stop diarrhea, and I was traveling by plane. I was growing up on the plane. Since then, I have some abdominal swelling and constipation. Did the amodia have affected my kidney? What should I do?
